name: @intentsolutionsio/api-documentation-generator
description: Generate comprehensive API documentation from OpenAPI/Swagger specs

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-documentation-generator\\n  or /plugin install api-documentation-generator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
